deploy.startCommand: bash -c 'mkdir -p storage/framework/sessions storage/framework/views storage/framework/cache storage/logs bootstrap/cache && chmod -R 777 storage bootstrap/cache && php artisan config:clear && php artisan cache:clear && php artisan view:clear && php artisan migrate --force && php artisan storage:link && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=$PORT'
